free_text: Angular distribution and correlation studies of 9Be,
Targets were mounted on a rotatable, centered ring.
Mg foil was dissolved to a thickness of about 100 keV
for 3-MeV deuterons. Self-supporting Be foils as well
as Be evaporated on 1-micron Ni foils were used. An
enriched 10B suspension was deposited on 1-micron Ni
thick and 1/2 in. in diameter, mounted either directly
on the face of a Dumont 6292 photomultiplier tube or on
